title: Color Converter: HEX to RGB, HSL, HSV & CMYK
description: Did you know 85% of standard brand colors fail modern accessibility tests? Check if your hex or rgb values pass and convert them instantly across all formats.

schemas.headline: Color Converter: HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV & CMYK with Live Preview
schemas.description: Convert your colors instantly with our Color Converter. Convert HEX to RGB, RGB to HEX, and explore HSL, HSV, and CMYK formats. Includes an advanced color picker online, accessibility checker, palettes, and more.

mainEntity.name: How does a color converter work?

acceptedAnswer.text: A color converter translates a color value from one digital model to another. For example, it recalculates the hexidecimal representation of red, green, and blue light into percentages used by HSL (Hue, Saturation, Lightness) or CMYK (Cyan, Magenta, Yellow, Key) inks.

mainEntity.name: How do I convert HEX to RGB?

acceptedAnswer.text: To convert HEX to RGB, take the 6-character hex code and split it into three pairs. Convert each base-16 pair to decimal to get the Red, Green, and Blue values (0-255). Our tool automates this instantly.

mainEntity.name: What is the formula to convert RGB to HEX?

acceptedAnswer.text: To convert RGB to HEX, convert each decimal value (Red, Green, Blue) into a two-digit hexadecimal number (base-16), then combine them in order, prefixed with a hashtag.

mainEntity.name: Why use a color picker online instead of native design software?

acceptedAnswer.text: Using a color picker online is fast, requires no installation, and often provides instant CSS code outputs and WCAG accessibility contrast scores which native design tools sometimes lack.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between HSL and HSV?

acceptedAnswer.text: HSL stands for Hue, Saturation, and Lightness, while HSV stands for Hue, Saturation, and Value. While Hue is identical in both, HSL models lightness symmetrically (100% is pure white), whereas HSV models value as brightness (100% can be a pure vibrant color).
